sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35411" key="e)nepi/skhmma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνεπί-σκημμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n35411.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">claiming of property alleged to belong to the state</tr_> (cf. <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀπογράφω</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0012.tlg001.perseus-grc1:111:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">111.2</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Harp.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
